              Backend:
              none
              
              changes apply on next task
            

            

              Approval rules
              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

              

                Per-category gates for the internal agent. Auto: run without asking. Ask: prompt for approval. Deny: block outright. Applied live and saved to intendant.toml [approval].
              

            

            

              

                Thread actions
                

                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                

                

                  Actions dispatch to the live Codex thread. New thread is the only button that takes effect without an active task; typing /fast with no target starts an idle fast Codex session. Goal actions use Codex's experimental persisted goal API. Errors surface as a toast + Activity log entry.
                

              

              

                Sandbox
                

                  
                  
                

                

                  workspace-write blocks listener sockets / pipes and outbound network. Prefer danger-full-access only when a task genuinely needs live app automation (UNO, D-Bus) or arbitrary network.
                

              

              

                Approval policy
                

                  
                  
                

                

                  untrusted: only run known-safe commands without approval. on-request: model asks when it wants to. never: execute without asking (only with an external sandbox).
                

              

              

                Model
                

                  
                  
                

                
Sent as model in thread/start. Empty = let Codex pick its configured default.

                

                  
                  
                

                
Maps to -c model_reasoning_effort=.... Only meaningful for reasoning-capable models; ignored otherwise.

                

                  
                  
                

                

                  Applies to new Intendant-managed Codex sessions. inherit leaves ~/.codex/config.toml and account defaults in charge; normal explicitly clears Fast for these sessions.
                

              

              

                Tools
                

                  
                  
                  off
                

                

                  Enables the Responses API web_search tool (matches codex --search). No per-call approval.
                

                

                  
                  
                

                

                  vanilla keeps upstream/fork Codex behavior. managed enables proactive Intendant context densification, rewind/backout tools, and suppressed Codex auto-compaction for managed long tasks.
                

                

                  
                  
                

                

                  summary keeps compact visualization snapshots. exact persists full raw provider payloads. off disables Context snapshots.
                

              

              

                Sandbox permissions
                

                  
                  
                  off
                

                

                  Only applies when sandbox is workspace-write. Maps to
                  sandbox_workspace_write.network_access. Middle ground between the default and danger-full-access when a task needs outbound HTTP but no listener binds.
                

                

                  
                  
                

                

                  One absolute path per line. Each becomes an entry in
                  sandbox_workspace_write.writable_roots (equivalent to --add-dir). Blank lines and duplicates are dropped. Press Enter-out or click away to save.
                

              

            

            

              

                Session actions
                

                  
                

                

                  Gemini latches every knob below at process spawn. New session forces a restart with the current settings even if nothing has changed. Other slash commands (/compact, /chat, /memory) aren't exposed over ACP — start a new session instead when context gets crowded.
                

              

              

                Approval mode
                

                  
                  
                

                

                  default: prompt for every tool call. auto_edit: auto-approve edits, prompt for exec. yolo: auto-approve everything. plan: read-only (no writes or exec).
                

              

              

                Sandbox
                

                  
                  
                  off
                

                

                  Maps to gemini --sandbox. Constrains shell execution and file writes. Leave off when you need the same environment as your terminal.
                

              

              

                Model
                

                  
                  
                

                
Sent as gemini --model. Empty = let Gemini CLI pick its configured default.

              

              

                Extensions
                

                  
                  
                

                

                  Passed as gemini --extensions=a,b,c. Empty = use all installed extensions (Gemini's default). List installed ones with gemini extensions list.
                

              

              

                MCP server allowlist
                

                  
                  
                

                

                  Maps to gemini --allowed-mcp-server-names. If you set an allowlist, include intendant or the Intendant MCP tools (take_screenshot, etc.) won't be reachable. Empty = all servers allowed.
                

              

              

                Workspace
                

                  
                  
                

                

                  One absolute path per line. Maps to gemini --include-directories. Blank lines and duplicates are dropped. Press Ctrl/⌘+Enter or click away to save.
                

              

              

                Debug
                

                  
                  
                  off
                

                

                  Maps to gemini --debug. Opens Gemini's Chromium DevTools console. Mostly useful for tracking down Gemini CLI itself.
                

              

            

            

              No external agent selected. Pick Codex, Claude Code, or Gemini in Settings → Agent to configure backend-specific knobs.

                Deep Search
                
              

              

                

                  

                    Log Search
                    Scans every matching session log, including full log files. Large histories can take minutes.
                  

                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                

                
Project narrows the scan before it starts; the remaining controls refine matches after the exhaustive scan.

              API Keys
              

                Saved to ~/.config/intendant/.env
              

              

                
                
                
              

              

                
                
                
              

              

                
                
                
              

              

                
                
              

            

          

        


        
        

          

            

              Settings are saved to intendant.toml and take effect on the next task.
            


            

              External Agent
              

                Route tasks to an external agent backend. Takes effect on the next task.

              Daemons
              

              

                

                  
Peer Routes

                  

                    
                    
                    
                    
                  


                  

                    

                      
                      
                    

                    

                      
                      
                    

                    

                      
                      
                    

                    

                    
                  


                  

                    
                    

                      
                      
                    

                    
                  


                  

                    

                      
                      
                    

                    

                      
                      
                    

                    
                    

                      
                      
                    

                    
Inbound grant: contains a client private key.

                  


                  

                    

                      
                      
                      
                    

                    

                      
                    

                    

                      
                    

                    
                    
                  

                


                

                  
Inbound Peer Access Requests

                  

                  

                    
                    
                  

                

              


              

                
Inbound Peer Grants

                

                

                  
                  
                

              

            


            

              Coordinator
              

                Capability-based discovery and task routing across all connected peers. Capabilities are kebab-case (display, computer-use, task-delegation, …) plus custom:<name>. Separate multiple with commas or spaces.
              


              

                
Find eligible peers

                

                  
                  
                

                

              


              

                
Route a task

                

                  
                

                
                

                  
                  Routes to the lexicographically-first peer that satisfies all required capabilities. Cmd/Ctrl+Enter in the textarea also fires.
                

                

              

            

          

        


        
        

          

            

              Session Report
              

                Downloads a zip of this session's logs (session.jsonl, turn
                files, daemon stderr/stdout) for sharing with the dev.
              

              
                Download session report
              
            

            

              Connection Diagnostics

              No debug overrides active. Set environment variables before launching intendant --web to see them here.
